name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and lines of credit secured by vehicle titles, plus unsecured personal loans. Memphis location operating since 2007.
description_long:
TitleMax is an emergency lending company with a physical storefront location on Summer Avenue in Memphis, Tennessee that has served the community since February 2007. The company specializes in quick-access financing solutions for consumers who need cash urgently and may not qualify for traditional bank loans based on credit score alone. Their flagship product is title-secured loans where borrowers pledge their vehicle title as collateral while continuing to drive the vehicle.

The Memphis TN 9 location offers three primary lending products: (1) Title Pledges with a companion Flex Line of Credit for secured borrowing against vehicle equity, (2) Unsecured Flexible Lines of Credit for customers who prefer not to use collateral, and (3) In-store and online Personal Loans. The company accepts most credit types and emphasizes fast approval and same-day cash availability. Loan approval considers vehicle value, cash need amount, and ability to repay rather than relying solely on credit history.

The Memphis location distinguishes itself through staff expertise (notably referenced employee Nicole appears in multiple positive reviews), bilingual service capability, convenient location one mile west of Highland Street, competitive rates relative to the title loan industry, and flexible borrowing options including both secured and unsecured products. The store maintains extended hours including evening availability until 7:00 PM on weekdays, making access convenient for working customers.

The primary honest caveat is that title loans and payday-adjacent products typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans, and defaulting on a title pledge puts the borrower's vehicle at risk of repossession. While the company accepts most credit types and advertises competitive rates, the actual APR structure is not disclosed on the website. Customers should carefully evaluate whether the convenience of same-day funding justifies the cost relative to alternative emergency funding sources.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for title pledges
Keep driving your vehicle while using title as collateral
Bilingual staff available at this location
Most credit types accepted; credit score is not sole approval factor
Flexible line of credit options — withdraw all at once or over time up to limit
Extended weekday hours until 7:00 PM (Mon/Fri) and Saturday availability
Both secured (title-based) and unsecured personal loan options offered
5.0/5 average Google rating with 481+ customer reviews
cons: APR rates and fee structure not disclosed on website; title loans typically carry rates 100%+ APR
Vehicle repossession risk if borrower defaults on title pledge loan
Requires clear vehicle title with no liens; limits eligibility
Unsecured lines of credit restricted to 10 specific states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Fast cash convenience comes at significantly higher cost than traditional personal loans or credit union alternatives
best_for: Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs ($500-$5K range) who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
Self-employed or gig workers without traditional paystubs who need emergency funding
Borrowers in Tennessee seeking in-person financial service with bilingual support
Consumers who prefer keeping vehicle access while using collateral rather than waiting for unsecured loan approval
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and cannot wait for traditional lending approval. The critical caveat is that title loans are extremely expensive emergency funding (often 100%+ APR) and carry vehicle repossession risk; borrowers should only use this product after exhausting lower-cost alternatives like credit unions, employer advances, or credit card cash advances.
services: Title pledge loans (vehicle title as collateral)
Flex line of credit (secured against vehicle title)
Online personal loan application and management
In-store personal loan application and management
